name: Rancho California Rice (Ronald Reagan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in butter until limp.
2. Add rice, sour cream, cottage cheese, bay leaf, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
3. In a greased cassarole dish, layer the rice mixture with chili strips, half the cheddar cheese.
4. Repeat layers, saving 1/3 cup cheddar for topping.
5. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
6. Top with remaining cheese and bake an additional 10 minutes.
